scripts.versioning:check: node --import tsx devops/sources/versioning.ts --workspace-path . --manifest-path Cargo.toml --package-name sendmail-sec --lockfile-path Cargo.lock
scripts.versioning:release: node --import tsx devops/sources/versioning.ts --workspace-path . --manifest-path Cargo.toml --package-name sendmail-sec --lockfile-path Cargo.lock --ref "$SENDMAIL_SEC_RELEASE_REF" --revision "$SENDMAIL_SEC_RELEASE_REVISION" --event-name "$GITHUB_EVENT_NAME" --release-prerelease "$SENDMAIL_SEC_RELEASE_IS_PRERELEASE" --image-plan-output "$SENDMAIL_SEC_IMAGE_PLAN_OUTPUT" --release-publish
